labels.ideal_content_profile: Close, slow-paced intimate moments — dinners, hands, candid laughter at low energy.
Quiet emotional storytelling — couples, candid intimacy, slow b-roll with wide dynamic range.
Friend-group montages, neon nightlife, bright daytime b-roll, fast cuts on faces.
Street-level fashion, fast cuts, reactions hitting the beat.
Process montages — studio work, sketching, fast hand-held b-roll with rhythmic motion.
